summary: K9Command Final Testing - Iteration 18. All 14 backend tests passed. All new features verified working: CSV exports (bookings/customers), BookingModal with booking types (stay/daycare/meet_greet), cash payment option, M&G override, Admin Settings page with Meet & Greet configuration.

ui_bugs.issue: Pricing rule display showed '$undefined' due to field name mismatch (multiplier vs modifier_value)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All final features verified: CSV exports work for admin only, BookingModal shows all booking types and payment options, Admin Settings page has General/Pricing/Meet & Greet tabs. Today's Agenda section in CustomerDashboard only appears when there are active (checked_in or confirmed) bookings for today.

csv_exports.bookings_csv_export: PASS - Admin can export, returns proper CSV with headers
csv_exports.customers_csv_export: PASS - Admin can export, includes dog/booking counts

booking_modal.booking_type_dropdown: PASS - Shows Stay (Boarding), Daycare, Meet & Greet
booking_modal.payment_type_dropdown: PASS - Shows Invoice (Pay Later), Card Payment, Cash Payment
booking_modal.meet_greet_override: PASS - Checkbox visible for admin/staff when booking type is not meet_greet
booking_modal.customer_selection: PASS - Admin can search and select customers

admin_settings_page.pricing_tab: PASS - Base pricing and pricing rules
admin_settings_page.meet_greet_tab: PASS - Duration, price, available days/times configuration

customer_dashboard.dashboard_loads: PASS - Shows stats, quick actions, sections
customer_dashboard.todays_agenda: PASS - Code verified, only shows when active bookings exist for today

bugs_fixed.issue: Pricing rule display showed '$undefined' because backend uses 'multiplier' field but frontend expected 'modifier_value'
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated display logic to handle both multiplier and modifier_value fields
bugs_fixed.impact: Minor display issue in Pricing Rules section

mocked_apis.email_smtp: MOCKED - Emails stored in email_outbox collection
